test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: TacticalTests passed (92), GuiTests passed (27), and updated GUI+tactical coverage directly exercise both spin-control surfaces and the no-fixed-width sizing contract.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md matches the implemented wxGTK spin-control sizing convention and the added GUI/tactical regression coverage.
environment_notes: xvfb-run was unavailable in the verifier environment; the GUI suite was run directly instead.
Tester artifacts report a successful headless run of cd tests/gui && make && xvfb-run -a ./GuiTests.
